leadText: Red Onion (Japanese: アーリーレッド Early Red) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V An ingredient with some sweetness to it. Its spiciness and fragrance are milder than those of other onions, making it a pleasant bite.

sections.title: In the core series games
